'''''DR919a''''' was the ship used by [[Jae Juun]] and [[Tarfang]] after the destruction of the [[XR808g]]. ''DR919a'' was a [[Damorian Manufacturing Corporation/Legends|Damorian]] [[Ronto-class transport|''Ronto''-class transport]] that was sacrificed in order to let the passengers board the [[Gorog|Dark Nest]] [[Nest ship|hiveship]]. As with Juun and Tarfang's previous ship, the vessel's name simply originated from its [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] registry identification number.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' {{1st}}
